description: Fixed multiple ATS polyglot SDK export issues: name collisions and duplicate property issues affecting Orleans, Azure role assignments, GitHub Models, YARP, and inherited resource types; missing Docker service config/secret/ulimit reference node type exports; a Foundry search connection export warning caused by an incompatible raw resource parameter overload; and exact-target export shadowing that caused Keycloak's target-specific OTLP export to collide with the generic IResourceWithEnvironment export.
name: Fix ATS polyglot SDK name collision and export issues
